name: Gently Yonder — Pinterest auto-post via Buffer (GraphQL API)

meta.notes: Buffer NEW GraphQL API (public beta). Endpoint: https://api.buffer.com, body: {query, variables}. Setup: (1) HTTP node auth = Header Auth credential, Name 'Authorization', Value 'Bearer <personal key>'. (2) Run buffer_get_channel.py to print channel ids AND Pinterest board ids (boardServiceId), then fill CHANNELS in the Code node: channel id, one board id per board name, defaultBoard, and the X channel id once X is connected in Buffer. Pinterest REQUIRES metadata.pinterest.boardServiceId - posts queued without it fail at publish time with 'no Pinterest board was selected'. The pin title and destination link now travel in metadata.pinterest (title/url); the post text is the description. X posts on all three daily runs, same pin as Pinterest. Channels left as PASTE_ are skipped. Test one manual run before re-enabling the schedule.
